use_cases: Users redeem loyalty points or rewards credits in e-commerce platforms
Creators redeem earnings or bonuses in creator economy platforms
SaaS users redeem promotional credits or trial conversions
Customers redeem gift cards or promotional offers
ai_summary: A redemption dialog component for converting points, credits, or rewards into tangible benefits. Built with Radix UI primitives and shadcn/ui design patterns, this overlay modal provides a clean interface for user reward redemption workflows in loyalty programs, e-commerce platforms, and creator monetization systems.
